business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

positives: Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
16 years in business with same management
concerns: HVAC replaced 2020 but plumbing and electrical systems original (2005)
No quality control / quality assurance program
OSHA citations in the past 3 years
No cyber liability protections in place
No building fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R (conflict with premises sprinkler indication)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 11 claims in 2024 (Travelers), 3 claims in 2023 (Markel), 6 claims in 2022 (Zurich - cancelled)

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas. 8 locations including 4 hotels, 3 restaurants, and 1 office across Austin, San Antonio, and Fredericksburg, TX.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. Written contracts with all subcontractors: Yes. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors: Yes. All premises sprinklered. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring. MSDS maintained. No quality control/QA program. 24-hour doorperson/security on premises.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: 2024: 11 claims with Travelers ($686,236.25 premium); 2023: 3 claims with Markel ($619,820.26 premium); 2022: 6 claims with Zurich ($607,294.45 premium) - policy cancelled. OSHA citations in past 3 years: Yes.
